login.title: Gelitaanka Lammaanaha
login.subtitle: Gali dashboard-kaaga lammaanahaaga
login.legalPrefix: Adigoo gujinaya sii wad, waxaad ogolaatay

register.title: Samee akoon
register.subtitle: Geli faahfaahinta si aad u bilowdo
register.legalPrefix: Adigoo gujinaya sii wad, waxaad ogolaatay
register.successMessage: Waad ku mahadsan tahay isdiiwaangelinta. Si aad u dhaqaajiso akoonkaaga, fadlan hubi email-kaaga oo guji xiriirka xaqiijinta ee aan kuu soo dirnay.
register.passwordTooShort: Erayga sirta ah waa inuu noqdaa ugu yaraan 6 xaraf

twoFactor.title: Aqoonsiga Laba-Qodob
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Geli mid ka mid ah koodhadhkaaga soo kabashada si aad u gasho
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Fadlan geli koodh soo kabasho sax ah (qaab: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Dhibaato ma qabtaa? La xiriir taageerada si aad u hesho caawimaad.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Koodh aan sax ahayn. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

setup.subtitle: Aan kuu diyaarinno. Fadlan dooro nooca akoonkaaga si aad u sii waddo.
setup.clinicDescription: Waxaan matalaa rug caafimaad ama xarun caafimaad oo leh dhakhaatiir badan
setup.labDescription: Waxaan matalaa shaybaar baaritaan ama xarun tijaabo
setup.individualDescription: Anigu waxaan ahay dhakhtar caafimaad ama cilmi-baare shaqsiyeed
setup.setupError: Ma dhamaystirin diyaarinta. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

messages.errorFallback: Ma awoodo in la diro email dib loo reset-gareeyo. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

success.title: Hubi email-kaaga
success.sentTo: Waxaan u dirnay xiriirka dib-u-dejinta erayga sirta ah {{email}}
success.description: Fadlan hubi sanduuqaaga email-ka oo raac tilmaamaha si aad u dib u dejiso erayga sirta ah. Xiriirku wuxuu dhacayaa 1 saac gudahood.

form.title: Ma hilmaantay erayga sirta ah?
form.description: Geli email-kaaga, annaguna waan kuu soo diri doonaa xiriir dib u habeyn ah.

validation.special: Ugu yaraan hal jilaa gaar ah

messages.requirementsMissing: Fadlan buuxi dhammaan shuruudaha erayga sirta ah
messages.errorFallback: Furaha sirta ah ayaa ku guuldareystay. Xiriirku wuu dhacay.

success.title: Dib-u-dejinta erayga sirta ah waa guuleysatay
success.description: Erayga sirta ah si guul leh ayaa loo cusbooneysiiyay.

form.title: Dib u deji erayga sirta ah
form.description: Geli erayga sirta ah ee cusub hoos.
form.newPasswordPlaceholder: Geli erayga sirta ah ee cusub
form.confirmPasswordPlaceholder: Xaqiiji erayga sirta ah ee cusub
form.passwordMustHave: Erayga sirta ah waa inuu ku jiraa:
form.requirementsMet: Erayga sirta ah wuxuu buuxinayaa dhammaan shuruudaha
form.passwordsMatch: Erayada sirta ah waa is waafaqsan yihiin
form.submit: Dib u dejin erayga sirta ah

messages.invalidLink: Xiriir xaqiijin khaldan. Fadlan isticmaal xiriirka email-kaaga.
messages.successFallback: Email-kaaga si guul leh ayaa loo xaqiijiyay.
messages.errorFallback: Ma xaqiijin karo email-ka. Xiriirku wuu dhacay.

state.loadingDescription: Fadlan sug inta aan xaqiijinayno cinwaankaaga email-ka...
state.successDescription: Email-kaaga si guul leh ayaa loo xaqiijiyay.

success.nextStep: Hadda waxaad ku soo geli kartaa akoonkaaga adigoo isticmaalaya email-kaaga iyo erayga sirta ah.

error.helpText: Haddii tani sii jirto, la xiriir taageerada ama mar kale iska diiwaangeli.
